form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.39) when fifth over 520m at this track in a Mix 5. Has four wins and seven placings from 15 starts from the draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 457m at Q Lakeside in a handy (25.56), beating Comical Warren. Will find this a bit tougher, shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.
